prestazioni: Engine swap to a **KF-ZE (2.0L V6, 24V DOHC, 160 PS)** with a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger**, custom **Tomei 260° camshafts**, and a **HKS Hi-Power exhaust manifold** for optimized spool and top-end flow. Pair with a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** for precise fuel and ignition mapping, targeting **300+ WHP** on **E85 fuel** with a **Nismo 555cc/min fuel injectors** upgrade.

Full **Cusco Type-RS 8-point bolt-in roll cage** with integrated **GReddy intercooler piping (2.5" aluminum)** and a **Setrab 500-series oil cooler** to manage heat under boost. Suspension overhaul with **Tein Flex Z coilovers (Cronos-specific valving)** and **Cusco front/rear sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear)** for reduced body roll and improved turn-in response.

Drivetrain reinforcement with a **Nismo 2-way limited-slip differential (LSD)** and **Toyota JZX100 5-speed manual transmission swap** (adapted via **Mazdaspeed bellhousing spacer**) for durability. Clutch upgrade to a **Spec Stage 3+ twin-disc setup** with a **Mazdaspeed lightweight flywheel** to handle increased torque. Braking system features **Endless CC-R6 rotors (280mm front, 260mm rear)** with **Project Mu 999.9 pads** and **Goodridge stainless steel brake lines**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Cronos-specific)** with **custom carbon fiber overfenders** and **Voltex Type-3 rear wing** for aggressive stance and downforce. Front bumper replaced with a **C-West J-Spec lip** and **Seibon carbon fiber hood (with heat extractor vents)** to reduce weight and improve aerodynamics.

**Work Meister S1 3P 17x9 +35 wheels** (staggered setup: 17x9.5 +38 rear) wrapped in **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires (235/40 front, 265/35 rear)** for optimal grip. Fender flares painted **Mazda Racing Silver (46G)** with **custom LED angel eyes (Osram CBI bulbs)** and **Morimoto XB LED fog lights** for a JDM-inspired lighting setup.

**Full interior overhaul** with **Recaro SRD seats (JDM-spec, Cronos mounting brackets)** upholstered in **Alcantara (Kuro black with red stitching)**. Steering wheel replaced with a **Nardi Classic 350mm (Momo quick-release hub)** and **NRG short shifter** for precise gear changes. Dashboard trimmed in **real carbon fiber (3K weave)** with **Defi BF gauges (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR)** mounted in a **custom A-pillar pod**.
